message:
fix(react): destructure runtimeOptions to prevent useEffect churn

ReactRuntimeProvider's useEffect depended on the runtimeOptions
object identity.  Since callers typically create the options object
inline (e.g., <ReactRuntimeProvider runtimeOptions={{ globalObject }}>),
React saw a new object on every render and re-ran the bootstrap
effect unnecessarily, tearing down and recreating the runtime.

Fix: destructure all runtimeOptions fields into stable primitive
variables at the top of the component and list each field
individually in the useEffect dependency array.  This ensures the
effect only re-runs when an actual option value changes, not when
the wrapper object is recreated.

Contract test updates:
  - wasm_react_example_contract.rs: markers updated to match the
    new destructured-locals pattern; negative assertion added
    confirming raw runtimeOptions is no longer in the dep array
  - wasm_js_adapter_lifecycle_contract.rs: same pattern — asserts
    destructured declarations exist and blocks regression to old
    [reloadNonce, runtimeOptions] dep array

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -105,12 +105,22 @@ fn react_adapter_threads_runtime_options_global_object_into_support_diagnostics(
         "export function detectReactRuntimeSupport(",
         "globalObject: Record<string, unknown> | undefined = undefined,",
         "const browserDiagnostics = detectBrowserRuntimeSupport(globalObject);",
-        "() => detectReactRuntimeSupport(runtimeOptions?.globalObject),",
-        "const diagnosticsSnapshot = detectReactRuntimeSupport(runtimeOptions?.globalObject);",
+        "const globalObject = runtimeOptions?.globalObject;",
+        "() => detectReactRuntimeSupport(globalObject),",
+        "const diagnosticsSnapshot = detectReactRuntimeSupport(globalObject);",
+        "const consumerVersionMajor = runtimeOptions?.consumerVersion?.major ?? null;",
+        "const consumerVersionMinor = runtimeOptions?.consumerVersion?.minor ?? null;",
+        "const healthPolicyCooldownMs = runtimeOptions?.healthPolicy?.cooldownMs ?? null;",
+        "const healthPolicyMaxConsecutiveFailures =",
     ] {
         assert!(
             content.contains(marker),
             "React adapter source must preserve runtimeOptions/globalObject diagnostics alignment marker: {marker}"
         );
     }
+
+    assert!(
+        !content.contains("}, [reloadNonce, runtimeOptions]);"),
+        "React adapter source must not key provider churn on raw runtimeOptions identity"
+    );
 }
